title: Marketing Intern
description:
We seek interns who resonate with our missions and are ready to own real projects. You will build a comprehensive marketing skill set—from corporate comms and branding to digital campaigns—by executing work that matters. Self-starters are encouraged to propose and lead initiatives, gaining hands-on project management experience from day one.

Content Research, Creation, and Management

  • Create original content: Conceptualise, write, translate, and design visuals for digital and print, using tools like Canva, Photoshop, and CapCut.
  • Manage blog content: Plan, write, and produce articles, visuals, and videos for the blogs. Research topics and define goals and target audiences.
  • Repurpose existing content: Adapt long-form articles into other formats like social media posts, guides, or infographics.
  • Manage testimonials: Collect and organise all testimonials in a central Google Drive for use in marketing materials.
  • Conduct research: Explore new topics and ideas for future content and proposals.

Digital Marketing Support

  • SEO Management: Keep all digital content optimised with relevant keywords in meta data, alt text, and articles.
  • Paid Ads (SEM): Execute paid search and display campaigns. Tasks include creating ad banners, setting up retargeting, and building landing pages.
  • Email Campaigns: Drive email marketing efforts from concept to execution to support broader goals.
  • Social Media: Brainstorm, plan, and manage content calendars for social platforms. Create fun, engaging posts and videos for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube and other platforms.
  • Monitor how well the posts perform and help brainstorm ideas to do better.

Event Coordination & Setup

  • Assist with planning and coordinating all event details.
  • Pack, sort, and label all event materials like décor and equipment.
  • Help set up and tear down event spaces, including placing décor and layout.
  • Manage the event inventory, tracking items before and after each event.

On-Site Event Day Support

  • Help with event day operations, including registration and signage placement.
  • Assist the production team during rehearsals and the live event.
  • Support backstage prep and coordinate with vendors on-site.
  • Ensure all materials are properly packed and accounted for post-event.

Administrative & Vendor Support

  • Maintain event checklists, stock lists, and packing records.
  • Research and compare vendors for décor, rentals, and supplies.
  • Assist with office organisation and material prep between projects.
  • Photograph event setups for future reference.

postedCompany.description:
Er Yuan and Adore Gaia are on a path to awaken and guide humanity in making conscious lifestyle choices for themselves and their loved ones.

Er Yuan’s mission is empower fated souls with clarity. By integrating the ancient sciences of Bazi and Feng Shui with the intuitive art of Tarot, we provide a unique compass for life's journey.

Adore Gaia is on a mission to inspire people to choose products that are better for their health from our Mother Earth - GAIA. There is an intricate relationship between Us, the Earth People and Gaia. Adore Gaia wants to create sustainable Love, Care and Benefits between Fellow Beings and Gaia.
postedCompany.name: ER YUAN PRIVATE LIMITED

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
